description: Overview of all numeric PostgreSQL settings using the settings_num metric. One row per setting per collection, setting name stored as tag. Replaces the legacy wide-column 'settings' metric that caused Prometheus label cardinality explosion.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (data->>'value')::float8 AS value
FROM settings_num
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
  AND tag_data->>'name' = 'server_version_num'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT (data->>'value')::float8 AS value
FROM settings_num
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
  AND tag_data->>'name' = 'max_connections'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: All numeric settings from the latest snapshot. One row per setting.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  tag_data->>'name'    AS name,
  (data->>'value')::float8 AS value
FROM settings_num
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
  AND time = (
    SELECT max(time) FROM settings_num
    WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
      AND $__timeFilter(time)
  )
ORDER BY name

panels.title: All Settings (current snapshot)

panels.description: Settings that took more than one distinct numeric value within the selected time window.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  tag_data->>'name'                          AS name,
  count(DISTINCT (data->>'value')::float8)   AS distinct_values,
  min((data->>'value')::float8)              AS min_value,
  max((data->>'value')::float8)              AS max_value
FROM settings_num
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY 1
HAVING count(DISTINCT (data->>'value')::float8) > 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Settings Changed in Time Range

panels.description: Value of the selected setting over time. Choose a setting from the $setting variable.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  (data->>'value')::float8 AS value
FROM settings_num
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
  AND tag_data->>'name' = '$setting'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Setting Value Over Time: $setting

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM admin.all_distinct_dbname_metrics WHERE metric = 'settings_num' ORDER BY 1
list.name: dbname
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM admin.all_distinct_dbname_metrics WHERE metric = 'settings_num' ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tag_data->>'name' FROM settings_num WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND time > now() - '24h'::interval ORDER BY 1
list.label: Setting
